channel.title: The Mutapa Times — Zimbabwe Property Listings
channel.description: Live Zimbabwe property listings with branded hybrid cards — photo on top, price and specs on the brand strip. One item per active listing for the Mutapa Times properties autolist.

item.title: USD 200,000 — Luxury 4-Bedroom Duplexes in the Heart of Strathaven (Strathaven, Harare West)
item.description: USD 200,000 — Strathaven, Harare West. 4 beds, 4 baths. Luxury 4-Bedroom Duplexes in the Heart of Strathaven. Browse all listings at mutapatimes.com/property #Zimbabwe #Property #ZimbabweProperty #RealEstate #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Property.co.zw
